title: 10-Pack Disposable Aluminum Foil Baking Trays - Food Storage Catering Aluminum Foil Tray - Containers for Meal Prep, Cooking, Baking, Roasting, BBQ, Freezer Storage - 32cm x 20cm x 3.3cm
features: Bake, Roast, Grill, Store & Serve In Style: From family picnics and BBQs to office parties, or professional catering events, the Maxxxcore aluminum foil trays are here to make your life easier thanks to their unmatched versatility and robust design.

Premium Food Tray Set For All Your Needs: Made with high-quality aluminum foil, our baking trays are not only durable and strong, but also ideal for all types of foods, from delicate pastries to hearty roasts, without losing their structural integrity.

Essential Baking Tray 10-Pack: Whether you are looking for a roasting tray, oven tray, cooking tray, meal prep container, or food storage tray, our heat-resistant up to 250°C, sturdy aluminum foil trays will cover all your needs.

Convenient Cooking & Cleanup Solution: Ideal for family gatherings, catered events, picnics and outdoor parties, community events, bake sales, or office parties, our disposable baking foil trays will take all the hassle out of cleaning up.

Eco-Friendly & Recyclable Disposable Trays: Our fully recyclable party food trays will help reduce environmental impact. Choosing our reusable tin foil trays means contributing to a more sustainable approach to food service and home cooking.
description: Here's How You Can Make Cooking, Serving & Cleaning-Up 99% Easier Looking for a set of disposable aluminium foil trays for your upcoming family picnic or BBQ? Do you want to take all the fuss out of that time-consuming after-party cleanup? Do you need a set of high-quality, multipurpose roasting trays for all your cooking needs? Introducing The Maxxxcore Foil Food Trays 10-Pack Now you can simplify your cooking, serving, and cleaning with our strong and practical foil containers, which are more than just cooking essentials; they are game-changers when it comes to prepping, cooking, storing, or freezing your favourite meals. Combining robust materials with versatility, our foil cooking trays can handle anything you throw at them (or in them) - from cookies and pastries, vegetables, seafood, meat, or homemade cakes to pot pies, lasagna, and casseroles. Top 3 Reasons To Choose Our Foil Baking Trays: ✅ Freezer-To-Oven Foil Trays: go from freezing your favourite foods to baking cookies without skipping a beat. ✅ Unleash Your Inner Chef In Style: perfect for baking potatoes, steaming veggies, reheating leftovers, or making your signature pie. ✅ Recyclable Foil Freezer Trays: embracing a commitment to sustainability, our foil trays for baking are 100% recyclable and eco-friendly. Need More Reasons? ✔️ Ideal for busy parents, event planners, college students, BBQ enthusiasts, and seniors looking for easy cooking and baking solutions. ✔️ Cost-effective baking trays for community events, classroom parties, picnics, and outdoor parties. ✔️ Can be reused multiple times before recycling. What You Get: 10 x Aluminum Foil Trays (32cm x 20cm x 3.3cm) Why Wait? Order Your Foil Roasting Trays NOW!
